CAREER OBJECTIVE                            
To secure a challenging position in a reputable company where I can broaden my knowledge, skills,  
and learning. To obtain a responsible career path that enables me to make full use of my education  
and experience while significantly contributing to the organization’s growth. 
EDUCATION QUALIFICATION   
 Bachelor of Engineering – Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning
CMR Institute of Technology, Bangalore
CGPA : 8.89, 2026 (Pursuing)
 Pre University Course – Science(PCMB)
St Joseph's Indian Composite PU College
93%, 2022
 10th Grade
Amara Jyothi English school
91.33%, 2020
TECHNICAL SKILLS                                         
Languages: Java, Python, HTML, CSS, JavaScript
Frameworks: Node.js, Express.js
Software: Excel, PowerBI
Database: SQL, MongoDB
PROJECTS                                      
Hospital Management System
 The Hospital Management System is a comprehensive solution designed to streamline hospital  
operations.  Built  using  the  MERN  stack  (MongoDB,  Express.js,  Node.js),  it  offers  JWT  
authentication and role-based access control for patients, doctors, and administrators. Sensitive  
data, such as patient records and billing details, is securely stored in MongoDB with encryption  
and  hashing.  Socket.io  ensures  real-time  communication  for  appointment  updates  and  
messaging. Doctors manage patient records, patients book appointments, and admins handle  
registrations and billing. The system also supports PDF invoice generation and is designed to  
scale efficiently, supporting large volumes of data and users.
 Tech Stack: HTML, CSS, MongoDB, React.js, Node.js, Express.js

--- Page/Section 2 ---
Smart Classroom Management System
 Built a web-based classroom platform using the MERN stack (MongoDB, Express.js, Node.js) to  
manage online learning and classroom activities. Added secure login with JWT and role-based  
access for students, teachers, and admins. Teachers could upload assignments, grade work, and  
post  announcements,  while  students  submitted  assignments  and  viewed  their  results.  
Integrated WebSocket-based  communication to  enable  real-time  messaging  and  instant  
classroom updates. Academic data like attendance and grades was stored securely in MongoDB  
with encryption. The system was designed to handle many users at once and support future  
growth. 
 Tech Stack: HTML, CSS, JavaScript, Node.js, Express.js, MongoDB, WebSockets 
SmartPDF Analyst 
 Developed  a  conversational  AI  application  using  Streamlit that  allows  users  to  upload  and  
interact  with  multiple  PDF  documents  through  a  chat  interface.  Implemented  smart  text 
chunking with overlap  for context preservation,  sentence-transformer embeddings with  FAISS 
vector search for efficient similarity retrieval, and integrated  Hugging Face GPT-2  for context-
aware Q&A. Ensured strict  PDF-only answer validation  with  source citations (filename & page  
number), maintaining reliability and transparency. Optimized for real-world use cases such as  
research  analysis,  legal  document  review,  and  corporate  knowledge  management,  with  all  
processing done locally for privacy. 
 Tech Stack: Streamlit, Hugging Face Transformers, FAISS, PyPDF2, LangChain 
CO-CURRICULAR ACTIVITIES 
Workshops: 
 Attended a workshop on Patent Design And Creation organized by Department of AIML
 Attended a Workshop on AI: What It Is And What It Is Not organized by Department of AIML
Online Courses & Certifications:
 Certified in Django Web Framework through Coursera
 Certified in Data Analysis with Spreadsheets and SQL through Coursera
 Certified in APIs Django REST Framework through Coursera
Hackathons: 
 Participated in GenAI Hackfest Hackathon, 2025
 Participated in Competitive Programming Hackathon, 2024
PERSONAL DETAILS                                                
Date of Birth  : 05-07-2004
Gender  : Male
Nationality  : Indian
Linguistic Competency : English, Kannada, Telugu
Hobbies                          : Cricket, Watching Series, Travelling

document_text:
Agentic Document Processor 

Multi-Agent AI Pipeline with LangGraph

Charan L

Project Intern — AI, Data & AI



Problem Statement

Problem:

Scope:

Need:

Enterprises handle large volumes of unstructured documents

Manual processing is slow, inconsistent, and error-prone

Single-model dependency introduces reliability risk

Weak validation and redaction increase compliance risk

End-to-end pipeline: classify → extract → validate → repair → redact → report

Unified handling of multiple document types in one workflow

Structured machine-readable outputs for downstream systems

Built-in quality checks and responsible-AI traceability

Reliability-first design with fallback execution strategy

Reduce manual effort and turnaround time

Improve extraction quality and consistency

Protect sensitive data through PII masking

Provide audit-ready processing transparency



Solution

This illustrates the robust 6-agent LangGraph workflow for end-to-end document processing.

Built a 6-agent LangGraph workflow

Agent flow: Classify → Extract → Validate → Self-Repair (conditional) → Redact → Report

Produces validated JSON, redacted content, metrics, and trace logs

Exposed through API and UI for practical usage



Architecture — What & Why

What:

Modular multi-agent architecture

Stateful orchestration

Conditional repair path

Fallback-based LLM execution chain

Why:

Higher reliability during provider failures

Better quality through validation + repair loop

Better compliance through redaction + trace logs

Easier maintenance and extensibility via modular agents



High-Level Workflow

Input document — accepts PDF, DOCX, TXT, image

Loader / OCR — extracts text; OCR used for scanned files

Classifier — identifies document type for routing

Extractor — converts content into structured fields

Validator — checks schema/rules and quality

Repair path (if needed) — retries low-quality extraction

Redactor — detects and masks sensitive PII

Reporter — compiles metrics and audit trace

Outputs — validated JSON, redacted text, logs, reports



Key Features

LangGraph-based stateful orchestration for dynamic and adaptive process flows.

Conditional self-repair mechanisms for handling and correcting low-quality outputs.

Schema-driven extraction and validation checks ensuring data integrity and accuracy.

Hybrid PII redaction approach to protect sensitive information securely.

Responsible-AI decision trace logging for transparency and accountability.

Multi-provider fallback for resilient and uninterrupted execution.

API + Streamlit interfaces providing flexible and user-friendly interaction.

Support path for OCR-based document processing to handle scanned files efficiently.



Evaluation / Performance

100.0%

93.4%

98.1%

94.6%

Classification Accuracy

Extraction Accuracy (avg)

PII Recall (aggregate)

PII Precision (aggregate)

100.0%

7.89s

Workflow Pass Rate

Latency

P95 12.99s

Evaluated on 28 documents across 6 document types, these key performance indicators highlight the system's efficiency and accuracy.



Future Scope

Batch + parallel document processing

Confidence-based human review workflow

Better OCR for noisy scans and table-heavy files

Domain-adapted extraction/validation templates

Latency optimization and caching strategy

Monitoring dashboards and failure/drift tracking

Policy-based redaction modes by use case

Production deployment hardening and controls



Thank You

Questions?

PROJECTS                                      
SmartDoc Analyst 
 Built a multi-format document analysis platform using Gradio enabling users to upload PDFs,  
DOCX, Excel, PowerPoint, and images for intelligent Q&A through a conversational interface.  
Implemented  LangChain  DocumentLoaders  for  unified  document  processing,  FAISS  vector  
database for semantic search, and Meta-Llama-3 LLM via HuggingFace API for context-aware  
responses. Features include automatic document classification, OCR for images, and RAG-based  
answers with source citations. Designed for professional applications such as resume screening,  
academic research analysis, legal document review, and business intelligence, providing accurate 
information retrieval with transparent source references.

--- Page/Section 2 ---
 Tech Stack: LangChain,HuggingFace Transformers,FAISS,Meta-Llama-3,sentence-transformers
BloodBridge
 A  real-time  blood  donation  platform  backend  built  with  FastAPI  implementing  intelligent  
location-based donor matching. Developed JWT authentication with role-based access control  
for  donors,  requesters,  hospitals,  and  admins.  Designed  MySQL  database  schema  using  
SQLModel  ORM  with  normalized  tables  for  users,  blood  requests,  locations,  and  donation  
records. Implemented WebSocket server for real-time location tracking and instant notifications. 
Built scikit-learn ML pipeline using RandomForest and GradientBoosting models to rank donors  
by  proximity  and response history.  Developed  RESTful  APIs with  modular  routing for  blood  
compatibility validation, Haversine distance calculation, health eligibility checks, and hospital  
inventory  management.  Created  automated  notification  system  with  audit  logging  for  
deployment.
 Tech Stack: FastAPI,MySQL,SQLModel,PyMySQL,scikit-learn,WebSocket,JWT,Pydantic,Uvicorn 
Multimodal Stroke Classification System
 Developed deep learning pipeline for stroke diagnosis combining brain imaging, EEG signals, and 
clinical biomarkers through weighted ensemble fusion. Implemented Vision Transformer with  
patch embeddings and transfer learning for MRI/CT analysis, custom 1D CNN for temporal EEG  
pattern recognition, and MLP with weighted Binary Cross-Entropy addressing class imbalance.  
Applied bandpass filtering, z-score normalization, stratified splitting, and data augmentation.  
Architected ensemble fusion with confidence-based voting and threshold rules. Integrated Grad-
CAM  for  attention  visualization  and  SHAP  for  feature  attribution.  Optimized  training  with  
AdamW,  mixed-precision  computation,  gradient  accumulation,  and  LR  warmup.  Deployed  
Gradio interface with real-time inference.
 Tech Stack: PyTorch,Transformers,torchvision,Gradio,SHAP ,Scikit-learn,CUDA
